cards.name: Communication Stone
rules_text: While attuned to and carrying the stone, you can expend 1 charge to cast the Sending spell through it.
The stone regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.
Whenever a charge is expended, roll a d100. On a roll of 100, the Communication Stone is destroyed.
cards.flavor_text: It delivers messages flawlessly — until it doesn't.
cards.author: wschu
